title: Restore lost wine data and remove logo from PDF export

requirements.text: Restore the wine entries previously inserted by the user that were lost. Re-populate the backend with the wines that were added before the data loss, ensuring they appear in the wine list on load. If the exact wine entries are not recoverable from context, seed the backend with the known sample wines (Croatia and Italy, at least 3 per country) as a baseline and ensure stable storage is in place so data persists across canister upgrades.

quotes: put ck the wine i inserted

acceptanceCriteria: The wine list is not empty on first load after deployment.
Previously inserted wines (or a restored set of sample wines) are visible in the wine list table.
Wine data persists across canister upgrades using stable variables in backend/main.mo.

requirements.text: Remove the Naturavini logo from the PDF export in frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx. The exported PDF must not include any logo image at the top or anywhere else in the document. The rest of the PDF content (wine catalogue grouped by country, all columns) must remain intact.

quotes: dont add any logo to the pdf not on the page

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Export to PDF' generates a PDF with no logo image anywhere in the document.
The PDF still contains the full wine catalogue grouped by country with all columns (Winery, Wine Name, Year, Wine Style, Grape Variety, Region, Price).
No errors are thrown during PDF generation related to logo loading.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo as a single actor.
Do not remove or alter the logo from the page header (frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx) — only remove it from the PDF export.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design of the wine list table or page header.
Adding new form fields or wine attributes.
Modifying the PDF layout beyond removing the logo.
